ai_decision.rationale: A low RSI nearing oversold territory, coupled with significant upside to target and positive product sentiment, presents an attractive pre-earnings run-up opportunity.
Despite a high price target, significant recent institutional selling indicates strong negative sentiment or anticipated headwinds, overshadowing potential upside for a pre-earnings run-up.
Exceptional recent earnings performance (Q4 net income surge) and positive outlook for future growth provide strong fundamental momentum for a pre-earnings run-up.
